name: Ollama Queue Proxy
description: Drop-in HTTP proxy for Ollama that adds per-client API key authentication, priority queuing (high/normal/low), and model-aware failover. Point your Ollama clients at the proxy instead of Ollama directly.

notes.text: Edit /opt/ollama-queue-proxy/config.yml and set your Ollama host URL (the default is a placeholder). The auto-generated API key is stored in /root/ollama-queue-proxy.creds.
